name: Ansbach's Set
description: Ansbach's Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is an Armor Set introduced in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This armor set offers very high overall stats, ideal for lightweight builds.
location:
Complete Sir Ansbach's questline all the way through the end, and side with him when facing Leda, and then Promised Consort Radahn/ Radahn, Consort of Miquella. After the fight is over, Sir Ansbach's body will be near the site of grace, alongside his equipment and his Incantation. [Map Link] [Video Link]. 
 Though it locks you out of Obsidian Lamina and Furious Blade of Ansbach, the armor can be obtained earlier by siding with Leda, in addition to her rewards.

name: Ascetic's Set
description: Ascetic's Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This set offers great negation with low weight, making it good for light roll builds.
location: Drop by Curseblade enemies.

name: Black Knight Set
description: Black Knight Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This set offers pretty good damage negation and are effective against bleed and frost.
location:
Black Knight Set pieces are dropped from Black Knights, found throughout the Lands of Shadow. 
 A Black Knight can be found in the camp just south of the Castle Front site of grace. 
 A Black Knight can be found right next to the Castle Ensis Checkpoint site of grace, walking down the path towards the North. 
 A Black Knight can be found just down the west path of the Castle Ensis site of grace. 
 A Black Knight can be found down the elevator next to the Castle-Lord's Chamber site of grace in Castle Ensis. This Black Knight is particularly easy to farm, as he can be backstabbed after sending the elevator back up, and it takes less than a minute to kill him and warp back to the grace.

name: Common Soldier Set
description: Common Soldier Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor.
location: Drop by soldiers in Castle Ensis and Fort of Reprimand.

name: Dancer's Set
description: Dancer's Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This armor set is ideal for role playing and light weight builds. It's bonus to dancing attacks also helps certain play style.
location: Dropped by Dancer of Ranah in Southern Nameless Mausoleum. The Southern Nameless Mausoleum is found in the Southern Shore region, on an island that can only be accessed through an underground cave. The entrance to the cave is on the mainland shore just south from the Cerulean Coast West site of grace.

name: Dane's Set
description: Dane's Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor.
location: Found under a waterfall in the lower portions under Bonny Village. This area can only be accessed by using the ladder in Shadow Keep to get down to a special teleport coffin (this Elden Ring Map location). This will take you to Ruins of Unte and you must follow the cliffs downstream and then carefully drop down to bottom level to reach the area. [Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Death Knight Set
description: Death Knight Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. Not only this set has high damage negation and high resistance, it also boosts any skills and incantations of the Ancient Dragon Cult, making it best choice for builds focus on these skills.
location: Darklight Catacombs, on a Death Knight corpse. To get this armor set make your way in the catacombs until you reach the first elevator. Head down the elevator and into the next room where you can head down the staircase on the right. Make your way to the beginning of the next staircase where you will see a broken portion of the railing, where you’ll want to jump down. In the room behind you you should find the armor set on a death knight’s corpse laying in front of a large pit. [Map Link] [Video Link]

name: Divine Beast Set
description: Divine Beast Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is an Armor Set introduced in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This set boosts strength, dexterity and helps builds using storms.
location: Dropped by Divine Beast Warriors, Enir Ilim

name: Divine Bird Set
description: Divine Bird Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This set boosts your kick attack damage, which is great for Hand-to-hand style builds. The helm boosts its user's strength, dexterity and Divine Bird Feathers, offset by costs to flask healing and focus.
location:
Dropped by Divine Bird Warriors. 
 You can farm this set from a Divine Bird Warrior near Enir-Ilim: Outer Wall site of grace.

name: Fire Knight Set
description: Fire Knight Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. The helm of this set offers good buff to max Health, Stamina and equip load, making this set suitable for tank builds.
location: Drop by Fire Knights in the Shadow Keep

name: Freyja's Set
description: Freyja's Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor.
location:
Freyja's Set appears wherever Redmane Freyja dies: 
 If you gave her Freyja's Letter, you can find Freyja's Set on her body after beating her in the Leda and Allies Boss fight [Map Link] 
 Otherwise, you can find it by the Storehouse, Seventh Floor Site of Grace after beating the Leda and Allies Boss fight

name: Gaius's Set
description: Gaius's Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This armor set is great for heavy weight tank builds.
location: The helm, armor, and gauntlets can be purchased from Finger Reader Enia at Roundtable Hold after defeating Commander Gaius. The Wolf Rider Enemy drops Gaius's Greaves.  [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Gravebird Set
description: Gravebird Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. The set enhances ringed light spells and jumping attacks by equipping the helm and chestpiece respectively. It is a lightweight set with decent physical resistance, making it an efficient choice for light-rolling melee builds.
location: Helm: From the Spiral Rise site of grace, climb the spire until you get the elevator shortcut back down. Ride the lift down and jump off halfway into a central altar. [Map Link]Chest: From the Temple Town Ruins site of grace head north, past the Red Pests servants of rot, and stick to the left. The path will start to head upwards and you will find several Gravebirds. Continue upwards and you will eventually reach an area where there are gravebird statues at the side, in the middle, against the wall, you will find the armor. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]Bracelets: South of the Pillar Path Waypoint site of grace, from a corpse at the corner of the altar.Anklets: Found in a swamp north of Moorth Ruins, accessed by heading through the cave northeast of the Moorth Ruins grace and into the swamp beyond. Item is in a poison lake infested with Gravebirds, below a big archway. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: High Priest Set
description: High Priest Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor.
location: Dropped by Count Ymir, Mother of Fingers, who can be found in the Cathedral of Manus Metyr after interacting with the throne, you can only find Count Ymir there after you have defeated Metyr, Mother of Fingers. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Horned Warrior Set
description: Horned Warrior Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. It has a middling amount of poise and defense, comparable to the base game's Knight Set. The helm offers its user extra strength in exchange for a slight decrease in flask healing.
location: Drops from Horned Warriors. An excellent farming location is just north of the Small Private Altar site of grace in Belurat, Tower Settlement.

name: Hornsent Set
description: Hornsent Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This armor set offers great resistance, especially focus. Suitable for most light weight builds.
location:
Hornsent Set is dropped by Hornsent wherever he's killed, which can be: 
 If you summoned him to fight Messmer the Impaler, he will drop Hornsent Set after invading you near the Rauh Ancient Ruins Site of Grace [Map Link] 
 If you choose to assist Leda and invade Hornsent in Shadow Keep, he will drop Hornsent Set once defeated 
 Otherwise, you can find Hornsent Set on his corpse after fighting him as part of the Leda and Allies Boss fight

name: Igon's Set
description: Igon's Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This armor set is ideal for light weight builds with it's high resistance and decent damage negation.
location: Complete Igon's questline by summoning him and then defeating Bayle The Dread. Igon will drop his items at his previous location, just south-east of Foot of the Jagged Peak [Map Link] his body will have both Igon's Greatbow and Igon's set.

name: Iron Rivet Set
description: Iron Rivet Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This set is good for early to med-game with decent resistance.
location: Dropped by Red Bear, a humanoid boss. This boss can be found at the Northern Nameless Mausoleum. The Northern Nameless Mausoleum is located East of the Temple Ruins. [Elden Ring Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

name: Highland Warrior Set
description: Highland Warrior Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. The Highland Warrior Set has one of the highest ratios of physical defense to weight, making it an efficient choice for light armor.
location:
Two versions of the Highland Warrior set can be found, one in Scadu Altus with the Leather Crown and Highland Attire, and the second in Rauh Base with the Leather Headband and Gloried Attire. Both can be found as full sets, and use the same arm and leg armor.  
   
   The first set can be found in the Scadu Altus, in a small orange forest east of the road leading to the Shadow Keep. From the Highroad Cross site of grace, head north until the road is joined by a path from the  southeast, and then travel to the forest due east. The set is located in the center of the forest, to the west of a pond where Ralva the Great Red Bear roams. [Map Link] 
   The second set can be found in Rauh Base on a corpse lying atop a short cliff near the area where Rugalea the Great Red Bear roams. From the Ravine North Site of Grace, head northwest to the orange forest past the river. Head up the upper plain by using the toppled pillar and jump on top of it. Head west until you reach the edge of the plain to find the second set. [Map Link]

name: Messmer Soldier Set
description: Messmer Soldier Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor.
location: Dropped by Messmer Soldiers.

name: Messmer's Set

This is a lighter suit of armor, with low defenses, but high immunity, focus, and vitality.
location: Bonny Gaol: Use the jar lift near the bridge twice to reach the top level of the gaol. First, hop on the jar, go to the bridge level, and activate the switch. Ride the jar lift for the second time to go to the top level. You can find the Night Set on a corpse laying on top of a table. [See SOTE Elden Ring DLC Map] [Video Link]

name: Oathseeker Knight Set
description: Oathseeker Knight Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. This set is a great choice for builds that requires Robustness and Immunity, along with decent damage negation.
location:
Found on a hanging body, just outside the Church of Benediction. [Map Link] 
   
   The Pata weapon is acquired alongside this set.

name: Rakshasa Set
description: Rakshasa Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor.
location:
Dropped by Rakshasa in Eastern Nameless Mausoleum. This area can only be accessed by using the ladder in Shadow Keep to get down to a special teleport coffin (this Elden Ring Map location). This will take you to Ruins of Unte and you must follow the cliffs downstream and then carefully drop down to second-to-bottom level to reach the mausoleum. [Shadow of the Erdtree Map] 
 From the Recluses' River Downstream site of grace, drop down the gravestone platforms while facing north, so as to land on the second-to-lowest level. Then head north and turn east through a bunch of slimes to find the mausoleum.

This armor set is ideal for role-playing purpose, and it's decent damage negation and resistance make it good choice for tank builds.
location: All the armor pieces can be bought from Enia in the Roundtable Hold upon defeating Rellana Twin Moon Knight.

name: Shadow Militiaman Set
description: Shadow Militiaman Set is an Armor Set in Elden Ring. It is a brand new Armor Set in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC. Sets of Armor in Elden Ring are composed of four armor pieces which are Helms, Chest Armor, Gauntlets, and Leg Armor. This set is particular good against poison and rot.
location:
The Shadow Militiaman Set can be found by killing Shadow Militiaman enemies. You can find them at: 
 Around the Shadow Keep 
   
   Out the door to the South-East of the Main Gate Plaza Site of Grace. Four spawn right outside the door, and with the Site of Grace being close this is a great place to farm the armor set. 
   Before the elevator to Storehouse, First Floor Site of Grace 
   Inside the Storehouse location

location: Can be obtained after defeating the Blackgaol Knight found inside Western Nameless Mausoleum. Blackgaol Knight can be found in the Western Nameless Mausoleum. Players will find a Mausoleum entrance west of the Scorched Ruins Site of Grace. The entrance is marked with 2 lit fires on both sides and a Stake of Marika. The stairs will lead to an underground room where the fight will take place. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

This Set is a Heavyweight armor that boasts superior Robustness Resistance.
location:
Moore drops Moore's Bell Bearing wherever he's killed, which can be: 
 If you kill a Forager Brood Pest, Moore will invade you and will drop this when killed 
 If you tell Moore "Remain sad forever", you can find this on his corpse by the Forager Brood Pest north of the Church of the Crusade [Map Link] 
 If you tell Moore "Put it behind you", you can find this on his corpse after fighting him as part of the Leda and Allies Boss fight [Map Link]

name: Black Knight Helm
description: Black Knight Helm is a Helm in Elden Ring. Black Knight Helm protect the player's head by applying various defensive properties, it also changes the appearance as well when it is equipped. Some armor pieces may be available to both genders, but may be slightly different for male and female characters.
location:
The Black Knight Helm Helm can be found at:Black Knight Set pieces are dropped from Black Knights, found throughout the Lands of Shadow. 
 A Black Knight can be found in the camp just south of the Castle Front site of grace. 
 A Black Knight can be found just down the west path of the Castle Ensis site of grace. 
 A Black Knight can be found down the elevator next to the Castle-Lord's Chamber site of grace in Castle Ensis. This Black Knight is particularly easy to farm, as he can be backstabbed after sending the elevator back up, and it takes less than a minute to kill him and warp back to the grace.

location:

 First, defeat Promised Consort Radahn / Radahn, Consort of Miquella in Enir-Ilim. After the battle, at the center of the boss arena, towards the golden orb. Select "Touch Memory" to trigger a cutscene. You'll obtain this item after the cutscene plays. [Map Link] [Video Link]

 3.00% chance to drop from Messmer Foot Soldier in Castle Ensis

location:

name: Gravebird Anklets
description: Gravebird Anklets are a Leg Armor in Elden Ring. Gravebird Anklets protect both of the player's legs and feet by applying various defensive properties. They also change the appearance as well when it is equipped. Some armor pieces may be available to both genders, but may be slightly different for male and female characters.
location:

 From the Moorth Ruins site of grace, travel northeast to the small triangular lake. Head through the cave to the north of the lake with the headless statute of Marika, past the flowers and perfumers, to  arrive in the swamp area. Found here, below a big archway, surrounded by gravebirds, in a lake of poison. [See Shadow of the Erdtree Map]

location:

 If you summoned him to fight Messmer the Impaler, he will drop it after defeating him once he invades near the Rauh Ancient Ruins Site of Grace [Map Link] 
 If you choose to assist Leda and invade Hornsent in Shadow Keep, he will drop it once defeated [Video Link] 
 Otherwise, you can find it on his corpse after fighting him as part of the NPC battle in Enir-Ilim.
